title: Crash & Error Handling
description: System detects crashes, generates reports, identifies mod causes, logs errors, and presents error dialogs

use_cases.name: Handle Crash
use_cases.description: Top-level crash entry point: logs error, saves game settings, writes crash report to disk, disposes network, then calls System.exit(1)

use_cases.name: Generate Crash Report
use_cases.description: Builds a crash report string with version, date, OS, GL version, Java version, memory, cores, enabled mods, patches, and full stack trace. Called from handle() and log()

use_cases.name: Identify Mod Cause
use_cases.description: Walks stack trace frames; matches class names or JS filenames against loaded mods to identify the offending mod. Returns null if none matched or no mods loaded

use_cases.name: Log Crash to File
use_cases.description: Writes a crash report to crashes/crash_<timestamp>.txt in the app data directory. Silent failure on I/O errors

use_cases.name: Show Desktop Error Dialog
use_cases.description: Logs error via Log.err, attempts SDL_ShowSimpleMessageBox, falls back to JOptionPane, then calls System.exit(1). Desktop/SDL-specific

use_cases.name: View Player Trace Info
use_cases.description: Displays player IP, locale, UUID, mod-client flag, mobile flag, join/kick counts, IP history, and name history. Provides copy-to-clipboard buttons for each field

use_cases.name: View Game Over Stats
use_cases.description: Shows game-over results: winner (PvP/campaign), waves lasted, units created, enemies destroyed, buildings built/destroyed/deconstructed, playtime. Fires WinEvent or LoseEvent

use_cases.name: Continue After Game Over
use_cases.description: Campaign: hides dialog and opens planet map (optionally shows difficulty guide if ≥2 attempts). Non-campaign: resets logic and returns to menu

use_cases.name: Display Full-Text Info
use_cases.description: Generic full-screen text dialog with pause; sets title and centered text body. Used for long informational messages

important_notes: CrashHandler is platform-agnostic; ErrorDialog is desktop/SDL-only with JOptionPane fallback
CrashHandler skips crash report file creation for developer builds (username=anuke, non-steam)
getModCause() scans stack trace frames against loaded mod class names and JS file names
GameOverDialog is not a crash dialog — it handles game-over (win/loss) state, fires domain events
TraceDialog is an admin/moderation tool showing player connection details, not an error dialog
FullTextDialog is a generic reusable text popup (pauses game); not crash-specific
All crash handling ends with System.exit(1)
CrashHandler.handle() saves settings before exit via settings.manualSave()
